code:
---
config:
  logLevel: 'debug'
  theme: 'base'
---
gitGraph
    %% Step 1: Initial state: main branch with v1.0.0 tag
    commit id: "1.0.0" tag: "v1.0.0"

    %% Step 2: Create release/1 from main for next release preparation
    branch release/1 order: 2
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.1"
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.2"

    %% Step 3: Create release/2 from the second commit of release/1 (FinTech_FraudDetection)
    %% release/1 at this point: 1.0.1-rc.1.post.2, so release/2 continues from there
    checkout release/1
    branch release/2 order: 1
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.3"

    %% Step 4: Go back to release/1 and add the problematic third commit (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.3" tag: "issues found"

    %% Step 5: release/2 completes preparation successfully
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.4"

    %% Step 6: Merge release/2 to main and release v1.1.0
    checkout main
    merge release/2 id: "1.1.0" tag: "v1.1.0"
repo_description: Automatic versioning for every commit - Generate semantic versions from any commit across all branches, or dirty working directory, with seamless pre-release handling and flexible format support for a

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech FraudDetection项目绘制一个版本发布流程图。核心场景是：main分支先有v1.0.0稳定版，然后我们要并行准备两个release分支，但release/1中途发现了问题，最终是release/2成功合并发布了v1.1.0。
明白了。我梳理一下结构：main先打v1.0.0标签，然后切出release/1做1.0.1的准备工作。release/1做了两个提交后，再切出release/2继续开发。之后release/1又加了第三个提交但标记了问题，而release/2顺利完成最后合并到main发v1.1.0。这个分支顺序对吗？
对，关键是release/2要从release/1的第二个提交点切出来，不是从main。而且release/1的第三个提交要标记"issues found"，表示TransactionQueue模块出了问题。release/2走FraudDetection路线，最后成功发布。
好的，我开始构建。main分支先提交1.0.0并打v1.0.0标签。然后切release/1，做两个rc提交。接着从release/1切出release/2，做一个提交。回到release/1做第三个提交并打issues found标签。最后release/2再做一个提交，合并回main发v1.1.0。
等等，release/2的第二个提交id应该是1.0.1-rc.2.post.4，然后合并到main的提交id是1.1.0。还有，release/1和release/2的显示顺序需要调整一下，release/2应该在上方，release/1在下方，这样视觉上线条不会交叉太乱。
收到，我设置release/2的order为1，release/1的order为2，这样release/2在上、release/1在下。release/2补充post.4提交，然后checkout main合并release/2，生成1.1.0提交并打v1.1.0标签。
检查一遍：main上有v1.0.0和最终的v1.1.0两个标签；release/1有三个提交，最后一个打了issues found；release/2有两个提交，从release/1的post.2分出，最终合并回main。这个流程准确反映了我们FinTech项目从TransactionQueue出问题到FraudDetection成功上线的过程。
确认无误。图已完整呈现：两条release分支的并行开发、问题分支的标记、以及成功分支的合并发布。config里我加了debug日志级别和base主题，方便后续调整样式。
